title: ilex aggregata
intro: Ilex aggregata, also known as the American Holly or Inky Berry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Ilex aggregata include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
